candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Morphine, $C_{17}H_{19}NO_3$ (shown above), has a $K_b = 8.0 \times 10^{-7}$. If a 0.00100 M solution of morphine is prepared, the expected pH will be in which one of the following pH ranges?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
吗啡($\mathrm{C_{17}H_{19}NO_3}$)的离解常数$K_\mathrm{b} = 8.0 \times 10^{-7}$。若配制0.00100 mol/L的吗啡溶液,则该溶液的pH值预计在以下哪个范围内?

A. 2至4
B. 4至6
C. 8至10
D. 10至12
metadata.explanation_zh: $[OH^-]$为碱离子浓度与离解常数$K_b$乘积的平方根。我们可以计算$\sqrt{(8.0 \times 10^{-7})(0.0010)} = \sqrt{8.0 \times 10^{-10}} = 2.8 \times 10^{-5}$。由于$[OH^-]$介于$10^{-5}$和$10^{-4}$之间,因此pOH值在4到5之间。因此,pH值在9到10之间。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The problem is fully understandable from the text: it asks for the expected pH range of a weak base solution using the given Kb and concentration. The chemical structure image is low resolution, but it is not needed to determine the answer.
